channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Iran's top officials attend prayer for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran - The Washington Post
